paragraphs: Fermi Inc's stock price is currently 6.32, with a decrease of 3.95 percent from the prior close and a decrease of 20.9 percent over the last 21 trading sessions. The company has seen 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include an announcement about Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus being built by Pantex, and an admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights. These articles were published by NewsChannel 10 on MSN and PR Newswire, respectively, on July 23, 2026.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including the appointment of four new officers, the resignation of director Miles Everson, and the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 0 Form 144 filings.
